old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-zhdb","title":"SLIP header duplicate definition of SLIP constants","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/slip_transport.h
Lines: 32-36

AND

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.h
Lines: 53-57

Both headers define the same SLIP constants:

slip_transport.h:
    #define SLIP_END     0xC0u
    #define SLIP_ESC     0xDBu
    #define SLIP_ESC_END 0xDCu
    #define SLIP_ESC_ESC 0xDDu

ble_ipsp_transport.h:
    #define SLIP_END     0xC0
    #define SLIP_ESC     0xDB
    #define SLIP_ESC_END 0xDC
    #define SLIP_ESC_ESC 0xDD

Note that slip_transport.h uses unsigned suffix (0xC0u) while ble_ipsp_transport.h doesn't (0xC0).

If both headers are included in the same translation unit, this will cause a preprocessor warning or error about macro redefinition (even though values are the same, the suffixes differ).

Fix: Create a common slip_framing.h header that both include, or use include guards around the definitions.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:55:50.531377Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:55:50.531428Z"}

new_value: removed duplicate SLIP constants from ble_ipsp_transport.h and added include of slip_transport.h; edited lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.h:32

{"id":"project-LICHEN-zhdb","title":"SLIP header duplicate definition of SLIP constants","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/slip_transport.h
Lines: 32-36

AND

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/ble_ipsp_transport.h
Lines: 53-57

Both headers define the same SLIP constants:

slip_transport.h:
    #define SLIP_END     0xC0u
    #define SLIP_ESC     0xDBu
    #define SLIP_ESC_END 0xDCu
    #define SLIP_ESC_ESC 0xDDu

ble_ipsp_transport.h:
    #define SLIP_END     0xC0
    #define SLIP_ESC     0xDB
    #define SLIP_ESC_END 0xDC
    #define SLIP_ESC_ESC 0xDD

Note that slip_transport.h uses unsigned suffix (0xC0u) while ble_ipsp_transport.h doesn't (0xC0).

If both headers are included in the same translation unit, this will cause a preprocessor warning or error about macro redefinition (even though values are the same, the suffixes differ).

Fix: Create a common slip_framing.h header that both include, or use include guards around the definitions.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"ec2-user","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:55:50.531377Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:51:31.879831743Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T18:47:24.105716932Z"}

new_value: Fixed duplicate SLIP constants by making slip_transport.h canonical source; updated ble_ipsp_transport.h and ble_uart.c to include it and removed local redefinitions; replaced SLIP_BUF_SIZE with SLIP_LCI_MTU for consistency. Performed 3 codereview passes (correctness, security, style); filed and fixed all P4 codereview beads (e.g. project-LICHEN-5you). 3 clean passes with no P0-P3 findings. Verified with grep for unique #define. Do not close until 3 clean.
